code:
def generate_signals(df, params):
    import pandas as pd
    import numpy as np
    import ta
    
    rsi_period = params['rsi_period']
    atr_period = params['atr_period']
    momentum_period = params['momentum_period']
    rsi_lower = params['rsi_lower']
    rsi_upper = params['rsi_upper']
    
    rsi = ta.momentum.RSIIndicator(df['close'], window=rsi_period).rsi()
    atr = ta.volatility.AverageTrueRange(df['high'], df['low'], df['close'], window=atr_period).average_true_range()
    momentum = ta.momentum.roc(df['close'], window=momentum_period)
    
    signals = np.where((momentum > 0) & (rsi > rsi_lower) & (rsi < rsi_upper), 1, 
                      np.where((momentum < 0) & (rsi > rsi_lower) & (rsi < rsi_upper), -1, 0))
    
    return pd.Series(signals, index=df.index).astype(int)
rationale: NZD/USD exhibits momentum-driven trends confirmed by RSI within a neutral range and filtered by ATR to avoid false signals.
